settings.name: baseUrl
settings.label: Server URL
settings.description: Jellyfin server URL reachable by the DiscVault container.

settings.name: userId
settings.label: Jellyfin user ID
settings.description: Optional Jellyfin user id for watched history. If empty, DiscVault uses the first user visible to the API key.

secrets.name: token
secrets.label: API key
secrets.description: Jellyfin API key used for library discovery and sync.
